Workspace Controls

Tune the voice workflow without making the product feel heavier.

Keep Navable smooth by deciding how Arabic and English are handled, when listening starts, and how much AI help is available.

Status

Changes save automatically.

Open new tab
Arabic + English voice Auto or locked language Privacy-aware summaries

Voice

Conversation behavior

Default path

Conversation language

Auto follows the user’s Arabic or English speech. Lock the mode when you want one consistent reply voice.

Shortcuts

Keyboard fallback

Use shortcuts when you want a repeatable path for demos or when voice is not the fastest route.

  • Scroll down / Scroll up
  • Next heading / Previous heading
  • Toggle mic

AI

Summaries and answer mode

On demand

AI mode

Choose whether AI only summarizes or can also prepare action plans from what it sees on the page.

Privacy

What Navable uses

Navable works from structured page content such as titles, headings, links, buttons, and safe field labels. Passwords and credit card fields are not collected.

  • Short microphone clips may be sent to the backend for transcription when voice is active.
  • Page snapshots are only sent for summarization when AI features are enabled.
  • Language mode affects replies and recognition behavior, not what page data is collected.
